criterion.description: Workflow correspondence result projects compatible structures into the reasoning report.

rule.description: A work item is ready only when hard dependencies are done or accepted.
A contract task is not complete until required proof records are present.

source.title: Workflow target document defines readiness, obstruction, completion, evidence, projection, correspondence, and evolution requirements.
The current baseline has no first-class workflow item, readiness, or evolution model.
